# Mode: daily recompute (00:00~now) UNION 10min incremental per-job union (10m)
# TZ: Asia/Taipei
# Jobs: ext_to_int_threat_unblocked, int_to_ext_flow_ioc, trojan_irc_top, cert_remote_top, dns_ptr_anomaly, ext_to_int_ssh_inflow
# Note: main src = daily_topn_src(00:00~now) UNION incremental_union
# Rules: public IPv4 only; exclude_cidrs=140.122.0.0/16; allowlist_ips=1.0.0.1,1.1.1.1,111.235.251.250,149.112.112.112,208.67.220.220,208.67.222.222,210.203.56.199,211.75.221.136,8.4.224.250,8.8.4.4,8.8.8.8,9.9.9.9; allowlist_cidrs=(none); allowlist_file=/home/kali/bin/ncloud/ncloud_allowlist.txt
